name: Calidi Biotherapeutics, Inc.
business: We are a publicly traded biotechnology company pioneering the development of targeted therapies with the potential to deliver genetic medicines to distal sites of disease. Our proprietary RedTail platform features an engineered enveloped oncolytic virus designed for systemic delivery and targeting of metastatic sites.

exposures.sentence: We are a publicly traded biotechnology company pioneering the development of targeted therapies with the potential to deliver genetic medicines to distal sites of disease.

catalysts.event: IND submission for CLD-401 Phase I trial
catalysts.sentence: We expect to file an investigational new drug ( IND ) application for a Phase I trial by the end of 2026 with CLD-401, the first compound from the RedTail platform, delivering IL-15 superagonist to the tumor microenvironment ( TME ).
